name: pdf-to-images-converter
description: Free online PDF to image converter - Convert PDF to JPG, PNG, WebP instantly

scripts.build: mkdir -p public && cp pdf-to-images.html public/index.html && cp README.md public/ && cp sitemap.xml public/ && cp robots.txt public/
scripts.start: npm run build && npx http-server public -p 3000

author: PDF Tools
